issue_summary: A variety of spots in the code can create a collection zk node after the collection has been removed.
javadoc_before: /** * Creates the path in ZooKeeper, creating each node as necessary. * * e.g. If path=/solr/group/node and none of the nodes, solr, * group, node exist, each will be created. * * Note: retryOnConnLoss is only respected for the final node - nodes * before that are always retried on connection loss. */
javadoc_after: /** * Creates the path in ZooKeeper, creating each node as necessary. * * e.g. If path=/solr/group/node and none of the nodes, solr, * group, node exist, each will be created. * * @param data to set on the last zkNode */
